steps.title: Identify what w and 92w represent
steps.content: The width of the rectangle is $w$ feet. The problem states that the length is 92 times the width, so the length is $92w$ feet.

steps.title: Recognize the structure of the area formula
steps.content: For a rectangle, area equals length times width. The given function is $y = (92w)(w)$, which is structured as (first term) × (second term) = area. The second term is the width ($w$), so the first term $(92w)$ must be the length. That matches choice A — A is correct.
